title: 1.1: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when global check has InitErr set
1.2: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when global check ConnRes.Reject is true
1.3: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when global check SenderRes.Reject is true
1.4: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when global check BodyRes.Reject is true
1.5: Tests that MsgPipeline delivers successfully when global check has no rejection errors
1.6: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when source check has InitErr set
1.7: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when source check ConnRes.Reject is true
1.8: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when source check BodyRes.Reject is true
1.9: Tests that MsgPipeline delivers successfully when source check has no rejection errors
1.10: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when global modifier has InitErr set
1.11: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when global modifier has MailFromErr set
1.12: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when global modifier has BodyErr set
1.13: Tests that MsgPipeline delivers successfully when global modifier has no errors
1.14: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when source modifier has InitErr set
1.15: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when source modifier has MailFromErr set
1.16: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when source modifier has BodyErr set
1.17: Tests that MsgPipeline delivers successfully when source modifier has no errors
1.18: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when a global-level validation/check component rejects during the RCPT TO phase
1.19: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when a source-level validation/check component rejects during the MAIL FROM phase
1.20: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when a source-level validation/check component rejects during the RCPT TO phase
1.21: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when a global-level transformation/modifier component fails during the RCPT TO phase
1.22: Tests that MsgPipeline returns error when a source-level transformation/modifier component fails during the RCPT TO phase
2.1: Places the test for global-level check/validation component errors in internal/msgpipeline/check_test.go
2.2: Places the test for source-level check/validation component errors in internal/msgpipeline/check_test.go
2.3: Places the test for global-level modifier/transformation component errors in internal/msgpipeline/modifier_test.go
2.4: Places the test for source-level modifier/transformation component errors in internal/msgpipeline/modifier_test.go
3.1: All tests use Go testing package with t.Run for sub-test organization
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern TestMsgPipeline_<Component>_Errors
3.3: All tests use the Setup-SubTests-Verify structure with MsgPipeline configuration setup, t.Run sub-tests for each scenario, and state verification at end
4.1: Verifies component state cleanup at end of test (e.g., a state/leak counter such as UnclosedStates equals zero) to detect resource leaks or double-closes
